content.en:
this day.

Several of the Nine-Fold Ancestral Ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building have exited the customs, of course, only temporarily.

They originally wanted to learn about the situation in the outside world, but they didn't expect to find that Ye Tian had broken through to the Supreme Ninefold Origin Ancestor realm, so they came directly to see Ye Tian.

This time, Ye Tian directly met the six Supreme Ninefold Ancestors of the Nine-Fold Building.

Dongchen Daozu, Beiyu Daozu, Chuanyun Daozu, Shanfeng Daozu, Jiuli Daozu and Danghai Daozu.

As for the other three Supreme Nine Ancestors, they are still recovering from their injuries because of their serious injuries.

Therefore, if Ye Tian wanted to see them, it would have been a long time later.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, congratulations!"

Dongchen Daozu congratulated.

At this time, they were also very confused, it didn't take long for Ye Tian to break through to their level.

Subsequently, Ye Tian had a conversation with Dongchen Daozu, and Dongchen Daozu also told Ye Tian a lot of secrets.

This made Ye Tian gradually know many secrets, such as the Xuanqi Realm where the Panshan Domain was located, and these Ninefold Origin Ancestors knew more information than him.

After all, Ye Tian had only obtained some information from the Purple Dragon Void Worm, and these Supreme Ninefold Ancestors had encountered many intersecting periods, although the territory of the Xuanqi Territory was different each time.

But based on that information, they naturally knew a lot about the Xuanqi Territory.

And the title of immeasurable lifeform was also known to them from the Xuanqi Realm.

There are many territories like the Panshan Territory, and the Xuanqi Territory has many of them.

And the immeasurable lifeforms of the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor level, there are also many in the Xuanqi Realm, and there are a large number of such immeasurable lifeforms in any territory.

"Dongchen Dao Ancestor, before in the Panshan Territory, a Supreme Ninefold Ancestor fell in the Secret Realm, and the Primordial Ancient Sea and the Truncated Forbidden Zone both had the fall of the Supreme Force, what happened?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

Dongchen Daozu said with emotion: "We have found a treasure land, which contains many precious resources, and even treasures that help us break the life level and advance from the primary-level immeasurable lifeform to the high-level immeasurable lifeform. As a result, they were attacked by a terrible race. That race had three mid-level immeasurable lifeforms, and they had also mastered the immeasurable path, and they were also immeasurable in the perfect realm. The Supreme Ninefold Ancestor of the Secret Realm was the first to discover that treasure land, so he was attacked as soon as possible. That Supreme Ninefold Ancestor was only a primary-level immeasurable life form, and the Immeasurable Dao was also a consummation realm. Therefore, he was killed by several bombardments, and there was no time to rescue. And we were able to retreat thanks to the Nine Xuan Dao Ancestors. If it weren't for the Nine Xuan Dao Ancestors dragging down those few middle-level immeasurable lifeforms, we Nine-Fold Building would probably have fallen one or two Supreme Ninefold Ancestors. "

"Nine Xuan Dao Ancestor!"

Ye Tian knew that this Dao Ancestor was the founder of the Nine-Fold Building, and he was also the most powerful Supreme Nine-Fold Ancestor of the Nine-Fold Building.

From the mouths of Dongchen Dao Ancestors, they learned that the Nine Xuan Dao Ancestors had raised the Infinite Dao to the limit realm, and had also almost raised the life level to a middle-level immeasurable lifeform, which was considered a half-step middle-level immeasurable lifeform.

It can be said that the Nine Xuan Dao Ancestor only needs to make some progress before he can break the shackles and be promoted to a mid-level immeasurable lifeform.

But even so, the Nine Xuan Dao Ancestor was still not an opponent of a mid-level immeasurable life form.

If it weren't for the Nine Xuan Dao Ancestor's immeasurable Dao realm being higher and reaching the limit realm, otherwise it would have fallen into the hands of that middle-level immeasurable lifeform.

It can be seen that the gap between the primary immeasurable life forms and the intermediate immeasurable life forms is too large.

If a middle-level immeasurable lifeform is dealing with a weaker primary-level immeasurable lifeform, it can even be killed in seconds.

In Panshan Ling, many Xeon also relied on the number to lose so little, otherwise they would have to stay.

"Is the Nine Xuan Dao Ancestor seriously injured?"

Ye Tian asked.

"The injury is not light!" Dongchen Dao Ancestor said, "However, Jiuxuan Dao Ancestor has also snatched a treasure, if he recovers from his injuries, he still has the hope of using that treasure to impact the mid-level immeasurable lifeform." "

"Is there a mid-level immeasurable lifeform in the Silent Black Sea, the Primordial Ancient Sea, and the Truncated Forbidden Zone?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Not for the time being!" Dongchen Dao Ancestor shook his head and said, "But after this time, maybe a mid-level immeasurable lifeform will be born!"

No matter which force gives birth to a mid-level immeasurable life form, it will become the most powerful force.

If a mid-level immeasurable lifeform was born on this side of the Silent Black Sea first, he would definitely wage war against the Primordial Ancient Sea, and take the opportunity to kill some of the Primordial Ancient Sea's highest level enhancements.

In the same way, the same is true of the Primordial Ancient Sea.

Therefore, it depends on which of the two sides gives birth to a mid-level immeasurable lifeform first.

It was precisely because the situation was so critical that one of the strongest Ninefold Primordial Ancestors of the major forces in the Silent Black Sea was in a hurry to retreat and practice.

And those supreme enhancement level that cut off the Black Sea were also similar thoughts, and they also went into retreat one by one.

Dongchen Dao Ancestor and the others did not communicate with Ye Tian for a long time, and they also continued to practice in retreat.

After all, a war would come soon, and it would naturally be best to be able to improve their strength during this period, so they were unwilling to delay their cultivation time.

"I've just become a primary-level immeasurable lifeform, and it's simply not realistic to step into a mid-level immeasurable lifeform in a short period of time. Even if war breaks out, it will be difficult for me to become the main force. For now, let's improve our strength as much as possible, if we can raise the Infinite Dao to the limit before the war, then we can also greatly increase our combat power!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But if the Immeasurable Dao wants to ascend from the Perfection Realm to the Extreme Realm, it is too difficult!

Now even the help of the Immortal Mountain is limited, although he can still accelerate the comprehension of the Infinite Path, but if he wants to quickly raise the Infinite Path to the extreme realm in the Infinite Mountain, it will take a lot of years.

And at his level, it is extremely difficult to improve a little strength.

"It's a pity that I can't enter the Panshan Territory of the Xuanqi Territory anymore. Otherwise, with my current strength, I will definitely be able to get more good things. You can even practice with the help of some treasure lands in the Panshan Realm, there must be treasure lands there that accelerate your comprehension of the Immeasurable Path!"

However, the treasure land could not be taken away, and now that the intersection period was over, he could only think about it.

Originally, Ye Tian thought that he would not be able to enter the Xuanqi Realm in a short period of time.

But on this day, there was a change in the truncation of Montenegro.

......

Click!!!

A crack was opened somewhere in the truncated Black Mountain, and although this gap was small, it caused a faint concussion of the entire Truncated Black Mountain.

And Ye Tian sensed this fluctuation for the first time, and quickly locked that gap.
